title: Assembly (disambiguation)
content:
'''Assembly''' can refer to:
*Either the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]] or [[Galactic Alliance Senate]].
*'''[[Assemblyman]]''', a delegation to the New Republic/Galactic Alliance Senate.
*'''[[Corellian Assembly]]'''
*'''[[Sector assembly]]''', a [[Sector/Legends|sector]]-wide legislative body.
**'''[[Ojoster Sector Assembly]]''', a legislative body of the [[Ojoster sector/Legends|Ojoster sector]].

{{Disambig}}

[[Category:Legislatures|*]]
